languages.text: The user's Toughness is reduced by −10%.

traits.locale_text:
Whenever the user's weapon attack is blocked, parried, dodged, missed, or hits cover instead of the target, the user suffers fatigued for 2 rounds.
While they have {g|f:30b20c0ee9b94aa09af18293c6e1222e}neurogenic shock{/g}, they suffer it even if the attack is successful.

Whenever the user's weapon attack is blocked, parried, dodged, missed, or hits cover instead of the target, the user suffers fatigued for 2 rounds.
While they have {g|f:30b20c0ee9b94aa09af18293c6e1222e}neurogenic shock{/g}, they suffer it even if the attack is successful.
The user's Toughness is reduced by −10%.
The user's Toughness is reduced by −10%.

Whenever the user's weapon attack is {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}blocked{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parried{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodged{/g}, missed, or {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hits{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}cover{/g} instead of the target, the user suffers {g|Encyclopedia:FatiguedEffect}fatigued{/g} for 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rounds{/g}.
While they have {g|f:30b20c0ee9b94aa09af18293c6e1222e}neurogenic shock{/g}, they suffer it even if the attack is successful.

languages.original_text: The user's Toughness is reduced by −10%.

traits.locale_text:
Если атака оружием обладателя аугмента встретила {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}блок{/g}, была{g|Encyclopedia:Parry}парирована{/g}, от нее {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}уклонились{/g}, она промахнулась или {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}попала{/g} в {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}укрытие{/g} вместо цели, обладатель аугмента получает {g|Encyclopedia:FatiguedEffect}утомление{/g} на 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}раунда{/g}.
Если у обладателя аугмента {g|f:30b20c0ee9b94aa09af18293c6e1222e}нейрогенный шок{/g}, он получает этот эффект, даже если атака была успешной.
